context: Identical rubric to trial-1 — grades features only, no language idiom checks. Combined with the language-neutral task (no 'in Kotlin' leak), baseline still scores 100% because the rubric checks behavior any competent agent produces in any language. Demonstrates that fixing the bleed in the task alone is not enough — the rubric also has to test what the plugin teaches.

checklist.name: addTask works
checklist.description: Calling addTask("buy milk") followed by reading the list returns a single task with title 'buy milk'

checklist.name: markComplete works
checklist.description: Calling markComplete(id) on a previously-added task flips its completed flag (or equivalent state representation) to true; the task remains in the list
